name: Amber Crunch
explanation: A compressed germanium hard-clip distortion in the two-knob vintage lineage. A single high-gain stage drives a pair of soft germanium/LED clipping diodes to ground, giving a smooth-yet-fuzzy, round and slightly dark distortion. Distortion sweeps from light grit to a thick compressed wall; a gentle post Tone tilt and an Output level finish it, with a dry/wet Mix. Controls: Distortion, Output, Tone and Mix.
